summary_translated: 临床自然语言处理日益依赖电子健康记录（EHR）数据来检测自杀行为，通常将临床记录视为比社交媒体更可靠的金标准。我们认为，这种表述掩盖了EHR-based自杀风险数据集所编码的特定操作化定义——其受数据撰写者、事件边界设定及模糊性处理方式的影响。本文以ScAN数据集为例展开案例研究，该数据集基于MIMIC-III临床笔记构建。我们展示治理约束、基于ICD的队列筛选、单标注员标签及住院期级聚合如何导致标签反映的是临床医生的判断，将自杀风险视为一个有边界的事件，并假设意图可从文档中可靠推断。语言学分析表明，相同标签实际上包含了在时间性、否定性和不确定性方面存在差异的异质临床框架。我们主张，临床NLP应在将标签解释为金标准之前，深入审视自杀风险数据集中隐含的假设。

summary: We use training-data attribution as an interpretable tool for capability discovery, mapping which regions of the pretraining corpus support social-reasoning versus STEM-reasoning in OLMo3-7B. Training-data attribution measures how strongly each training document influences a model's predictions on a benchmark, but document-level scores are too noisy to identify which corpus regions support which capabilities, and prior work has emphasized factual knowledge rather than reasoning. We compute gradient-based attribution (TrackStar via Bergson) over a working set drawn from the de-duplicated Dolma3 mix, aggregate influence across WebOrganizer's 24-format x 24-topic taxonomy (576 bins), and contrast benchmark pairs in a 2x2 design that varies domain (social vs. STEM) and capability type (reasoning vs. knowledge): SocialIQA and MMLU Social Sciences against ARC-Challenge and MMLU STEM. Social and STEM reasoning draw on qualitatively distinct corpus regions, and the contrast is sharper at the reasoning level than at the knowledge level. Targeted machine unlearning provides partial causal validation: forgetting high-attribution topic bins (e.g., Literature for SocialIQA) degrades the aligned benchmark more than within-bin random baselines, and we open-source all code, sampling manifests, the bin-level influence matrix, and unlearning checkpoints.
title: Where Does Social Reasoning Come From? Capability Provenance in Language Models
title_translated: 社会推理从何而来？语言模型中能力来源的溯源分析
summary_translated: 我们使用训练数据归因作为可解释的工具，用于发现OLMo3-7B模型中的能力来源，具体映射哪些预训练语料库区域支持社会推理而非STEM推理。训练数据归因衡量每篇训练文档对模型在基准测试中预测结果的影响强度，但文档级别得分过于嘈杂，难以识别支持特定能力的语料库区域；以往研究也更关注事实知识而非推理能力。我们对从去重后的Dolma3混合语料中抽取的工作集，采用基于梯度的归因方法（TrackStar via Bergson），将影响聚合至WebOrganizer的24种格式×24个主题分类体系（共576个桶），并通过2×2实验设计对比基准对：SocialIQA与MMLU社会科学 vs. ARC-Challenge与MMLU STEM。结果显示，社会推理与STEM推理依赖于质性上截然不同的语料库区域，且在推理层面的差异比知识层面更为显著。定向机器遗忘提供了部分因果验证：遗忘高归因主题桶（如SocialIQA对应文学）会比组内随机基线更显著降低对应基准性能。所有代码、采样清单、桶级影响矩阵及遗忘检查点均已开源。

summary: In this technical report, we focus on solving the challenge of Vietnamese multi-document abstractive summarization, introduced in the International Workshop on Vietnamese Language and Speech Processing (VLSP) 2022. We choose to follow the popular hierarchical approach, i.e. condensing each document followed by aggregation and summarization. We propose a novel yet simple strategy to shorten documents that is driven by the golden summary, thus ensuring high correlation between stages of the hierarchical approach. Our method achieves a ROUGE2-F1 score of 0.2468 on the VLSP's public test set, and can produce fluent and concise summaries. Additionally, we utilize external sources for extra data, which greatly enhances the quantity of data for Vietnamese multi-document summarization. The additional data is made available for the community.
title: A BART-based approach with hierarchical strategy for Vietnamese abstractive multi-document summarization
title_translated: 基于BART的分层策略用于越南语抽象式多文档摘要
summary_translated: 本技术报告聚焦于解决在2022年越南语言与语音处理国际研讨会（VLSP）中提出的越南语多文档抽象式摘要挑战。我们采用流行的分层方法，即先对每篇文档进行压缩，再进行聚合与摘要。我们提出一种新颖但简单的文档缩短策略，该策略由黄金摘要驱动，从而确保分层流程各阶段之间的高度相关性。我们的方法在VLSP公开测试集上取得了ROUGE2-F1得分为0.2468的成绩，并能生成流畅且简洁的摘要。此外，我们利用外部数据源扩充了越南语多文档摘要的数据量，这些额外数据已向社区开放。

summary: Structural ambiguity arises when a single sentence admits multiple valid interpretations due to its syntactic structure, posing a fundamental challenge for language understanding. Visual scenes serve as useful cues for resolving such ambiguity, and Vision and Language Models (VLMs) need to be capable of deriving possible semantic interpretations from visual scenes. We introduce Language and Vision Structural Ambiguity (LaViSA), a benchmark designed to evaluate the ability of VLMs to resolve structural ambiguity leveraging visual scenes. LaViSA consists of ambiguous sentences, their disambiguated sentences, and corresponding images of these disambiguated sentences across seven ambiguity categories. Using LaViSA, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of diverse VLMs, including both proprietary and open-source models with varying parameter scales and reasoning capabilities. Experimental results show that although recent VLMs can leverage visual scenes to resolve structural ambiguity to a some extent, they still struggle with certain ambiguity types and visually subtle semantic distinctions, indicating remaining limitations in resolving structural ambiguity using visual scenes.
title: LaViSA: A Language and Vision Structural Ambiguity Benchmark
title_translated: LaViSA：语言与视觉结构歧义基准测试
summary_translated: 当单个句子由于其句法结构而存在多种有效解释时，就会产生结构歧义，这对语言理解构成了根本性挑战。视觉场景可作为解决此类歧义的有用线索，视觉与语言模型（VLMs）需要具备从视觉场景中推导出可能语义解释的能力。我们提出了语言与视觉结构歧义（LaViSA）基准测试，旨在评估VLMs利用视觉场景解决结构歧义的能力。LaViSA包含七类歧义中的模糊句子、其消歧后的句子以及对应消歧句子的图像。通过LaViSA，我们对多种VLM进行了全面评估，涵盖不同参数规模和推理能力的专有及开源模型。实验结果表明，尽管近期VLM能够一定程度上借助视觉场景解决结构歧义，但在某些歧义类型和视觉细微语义差异方面仍存在困难，表明利用视觉场景解决结构歧义仍存在局限。

summary: LLM-as-a-Judge has become the dominant evaluation paradigm for language models, but judge validation in practice relies on exact-match agreement, a metric that does not correct for chance and systematically overstates discriminative ability. We present the largest systematic evaluation of LLM-as-a-Judge to date: 21 judges from nine providers across MT-Bench, JudgeBench, and RewardBench, evaluated under three protocols (agreement, consistency, bias audit) over 118 runs and approximately 541,000 individual judgments. Four findings emerge, consistent across the full cohort, including the April 2026 frontier: kappa deflation between exact match and Cohen's kappa is universal (33--41 pp on MT-Bench), judge rankings shift by up to 14 positions across benchmarks, high test--retest reliability (>0.95) coexists with severe position bias (>0.10) in two production-deployed judges (instantiating a consistency--bias paradox), and verbosity bias is small (<0.011) across our cohort under a single pairwise rubric. We distill these into a Minimum Viable Validation Protocol.
title: Reliability without Validity: A Systematic, Large-Scale Evaluation of LLM-as-a-Judge Models Across Agreement, Consistency, and Bias
title_translated: 可靠性不等于有效性：跨一致性、一致性和偏见的大规模系统性评估LLM作为评判者模型
summary_translated: LLM作为评判者已成为语言模型评估的主流范式，但实践中评判者验证依赖于精确匹配的一致性，这一指标未校正随机因素，系统性地夸大了判别能力。我们呈现迄今为止最大规模的系统性评估：来自九家提供商的21名评判者，在MT-Bench、JudgeBench和RewardBench上，经过三个协议（一致性、稳定性、偏见审计）共118次运行，约54.1万次独立判断。四项发现贯穿整个样本群体，包括2026年4月前沿情况：精确匹配与Cohen's kappa之间的kappa膨胀普遍存在（在MT-Bench上为33–41个百分点），评判者排名在不同基准间最高变动达14位，高重测信度（>0.95）与严重位置偏见（>0.10）同时存在于两个生产部署的评判者中（形成一致性-偏见悖论），在单一成对评分标准下，冗长性偏见极小（<0.011）。我们据此提炼出最小可行验证协议。

summary: The narrative composition of web-scale LLM pretraining corpora remains largely unexplored even though narrative is a fundamental mode of human communication. We present the first fine-grained study of narrative features in Dolma, a 3-trillion-token open pretraining corpus. Drawing on narrative theory, we design a framework spanning three core narrative elements (agency, setting, and events) operationalized as 11 interpretable dimensions. After sampling and annotating a diverse set of 400 passages, we finetune and validate NarraBERT, a RoBERTa-based model for fine-grained narrative prediction. We apply NarraBERT to 3M passages, resulting in a new dataset, NarraDolma. We find (i) narrative structure is measurable at scale across extremely heterogeneous data, (ii) we uncover a continuous, multidimensional narrative structure underlying web text, and (iii) narrative qualities are unequally distributed across pretraining sources and topics in ways that current curation practices neither measure nor account for. Our framework, dataset, and analyses provide a foundation for understanding how narrative qualities are distributed in LLM pretraining data and for studying how data composition affects narrative reasoning tasks. We publicly release NarraDolma and NarraBERT.
title: Characterizing Narrative Content in Web-scale LLM Pretraining Data
comment: 8 pages of main content, 28 total pages. 30 figures
title_translated: 刻画网络规模大语言模型预训练数据中的叙事内容
summary_translated: 尽管叙事是人类交流的基本方式，但网络规模大语言模型预训练语料库中的叙事构成仍 largely 未被深入探索。我们首次对Dolma——一个3万亿token的开放预训练语料库——中的细粒度叙事特征进行了研究。基于叙事理论，我们设计了一个涵盖三个核心叙事元素（主体性、背景、事件）的框架，并将其操作化为11个可解释维度。通过对400段多样文本采样并标注后，我们微调并验证了NarraBERT——一个基于RoBERTa的细粒度叙事预测模型。我们将NarraBERT应用于300万段文本，生成新数据集NarraDolma。研究发现：(i) 叙事结构可在极端异构数据中大规模测量；(ii) 我们揭示了网络文本背后存在连续且多维的叙事结构；(iii) 叙事质量在预训练来源和主题间分布不均，而当前数据筛选实践既无法衡量也无法考虑这种分布。我们的框架、数据集与分析为理解叙事质量在LLM预训练数据中的分布，以及研究数据构成如何影响叙事推理任务提供了基础。我们已公开发布NarraDolma与NarraBERT。

summary: When multi-agent LLM systems produce bad answers, not all failures are equal: some answers are grounded in the right material but incomplete, while others are simply ungrounded and should be stopped. Current retry strategies treat both cases identically (try again and hope for the best), leaving human supervisors unable to tell whether a retry was warranted or whether the system should have halted instead.   We introduce the Argent Signaling Protocol (ASP), a compact machine-readable header that accompanies every AI-generated response with structured quality signals: certainty (@C), grounding (@G), stochasticity (@S), and an assumption index that classifies the evidentiary basis of each claim. These signals enable a controller to distinguish repairable failures from containment failures and route each case differently.   We evaluate ASP in two modes. In standalone mode, a 27-question document-grounded QA benchmark over the Array BioPharma/Ono license agreement compares baseline prompts against ASP-instrumented controller actions across three local GGUF models. On Qwen~(0.8B), ASP improves pass rate from 11.1% to 33.3% and mean term coverage from 36.7% to 65.4%; on Dobby~(8B), ASP produces 4 fail-to-pass recoveries, raising pass rate from 33.3% to 44.4%; on SmolLM3~(3B), ASP alternates between repair and containment per question. Aggregate improvement is meaningful (12/81 to 21/81 passes). In multi-agent mode, an ASP sidecar sits between a retrieval agent and a downstream decision agent; the sidecar blocks 100% of ungrounded upstream outputs from reaching the downstream agent (24/27 blocked, 0 ungrounded propagations).
title: Trustworthy Multi-Agent Systems: Mitigating Semantic Drift with the Argent Signaling Protocol
title_translated: 可信多智能体系统：通过Argent信号协议缓解语义漂移
summary_translated: 在多智能体大语言模型系统中产生错误答案时，并非所有失败都同等严重：有些答案虽基于正确材料但不完整，而另一些则完全无依据，应立即终止。当前重试策略对两类失败一视同仁（再次尝试，寄希望于更好结果），导致人工监督者无法判断是否应重试或应停止系统。我们提出Argent信号协议（ASP），一种紧凑的机器可读头信息，伴随每个AI生成的回答，提供结构化的质量信号：确定性（@C）、依据性（@G）、随机性（@S）以及一个假设索引，用于分类每个主张的证据基础。这些信号使控制器能够区分可修复失败与需遏制失败，并分别处理。我们在两种模式下评估ASP：在独立模式下，基于Array BioPharma/Ono许可协议的27题文档支撑问答基准，对比基线提示与ASP增强控制器在三个本地GGUF模型上的表现。在Qwen（0.8B）上，ASP将通过率从11.1%提升至33.3%，平均条款覆盖率从36.7%提升至65.4%；在Dobby（8B）上，ASP实现4次“失败转通过”恢复，通过率从33.3%升至44.4%；在SmolLM3（3B）上，ASP根据问题交替执行修复与遏制。总体改进显著（从81题中的12次通过增至21次）。在多智能体模式下，ASP旁路组件位于检索智能体与下游决策智能体之间，成功阻止100%的无依据上游输出进入下游智能体（24/27被阻拦，0次无依据传播）。

summary: Test-time scaling (TTS) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for improving the reasoning performance of large language models (LLMs) by investing additional compute at inference time. A central component of TTS is the \emph{verifier}, which selects or scores candidate solutions to guide the search process. While prior work has explored the benefit of verification, a fundamental question remains underexplored: \emph{what is the optimal granularity of verification under a given compute budget?} Coarse-grained outcome reward models (ORMs) and fine-grained process reward models (PRMs) represent two extremes, yet neither alone achieves compute-optimality across all regimes. In this paper, we establish a unified theoretical framework, called \textbf{GRACE} (\underline{G}ranularity-\underline{R}egulated \underline{A}daptive \underline{C}omputational \underline{E}fficiency), that characterizes the optimal verification granularity as an explicit function of problem difficulty, verifier accuracy, and compute budget. We prove that there exists a phase transition: fine-grained verification dominates when either the compute budget is large or the problem is hard, whereas coarse-grained verification is preferred in the low-budget, easy-problem regime. Our theory unifies Best-of-$N$, beam search, and step-level MCTS within a single Pareto-optimality framework, and motivates an adaptive granularity strategy that provably achieves the compute-performance Pareto frontier. Empirical results on MATH-500, GSM8K, and AIME benchmarks corroborate all four theoretical claims, with our adaptive strategy outperforming fixed-granularity baselines by up to 3.1\% accuracy at matched compute.
title: Granularity-Regulated Adaptive Computational Efficiency for Optimal Verification in Test-Time Scaling
title_translated: 测试时缩放中基于粒度调节的自适应计算效率以实现最优验证
summary_translated: 测试时缩放（TTS）作为一种强大的范式，通过在推理时投入额外计算资源来提升大语言模型（LLMs）的推理性能。TTS的核心组件是验证器，它通过选择或评分候选解决方案来引导搜索过程。尽管先前的研究探讨了验证的好处，但一个基本问题仍缺乏深入研究：在给定计算预算下，验证的最佳粒度是什么？粗粒度结果奖励模型（ORMs）和细粒度过程奖励模型（PRMs）代表了两个极端，但单独使用均无法在所有场景下实现计算最优。本文提出统一的理论框架——GRACE（粒度调节的自适应计算效率），将最优验证粒度明确建模为问题难度、验证器准确率和计算预算的函数。我们证明存在相变现象：当计算预算较大或问题较难时，细粒度验证占优；而在低预算、简单问题场景下，粗粒度验证更优。该理论统一了Best-of-$N$、束搜索和步骤级MCTS，并提出了可证明达到计算-性能帕累托前沿的自适应粒度策略。在MATH-500、GSM8K和AIME基准上的实证结果验证了所有四个理论假设，我们的自适应策略在相同计算量下相比固定粒度基线最高提升了3.1%的准确率。

summary: In-Context Learning (ICL) allows LLMs to adapt to new tasks from a few demonstrations, but its reliability remains a concern: predictions are highly sensitive to both prompt design and the model's ability to understand the context, obscuring whether failures arise from data properties or model limitations. Uncertainty decomposition-separating aleatoric from epistemic sources-is particularly crucial in this setting, yet existing methods, designed for standard generation tasks, fail to capture the unique dynamics of ICL. To address this, we introduce a concept of self-function vectors, built upon Bayesian views and the mechanistic interpretability of ICL. These vectors leverage internal model representations to model the latent concept learned during in-context prompting, thereby enabling a direct estimation of aleatoric uncertainty within a Bayesian framework and circumventing the reliance on brittle input or decoding manipulations. Given the lack of established benchmarks and suitable evaluation protocols, we also propose the first and rigorous evaluation protocol, in which data is manipulated in controlled ways so as to quantify aleatoric uncertainty precisely and separately from epistemic uncertainty. With this new evaluation framework, initially grounded in synthetic tasks for conceptual development and subsequently extended to real-world datasets, we show that our proposed methodology can measure uncertainty of LLM predictions made under ICL more reliably than existing alternative methods. Moreover, we show it can be used as a practical tool for trustworthy-related applications, such as hallucination detection. Our findings pave a new direction for connecting the quantitative view of uncertainty with the mechanistic understanding of model behavior.
title: Quantifying Aleatoric Uncertainty of In-Context Learning for Robust Measure of LLM Prediction Confidence
title_translated: 量化上下文学习中的随机不确定性以获得鲁棒的LLM预测置信度衡量
summary_translated: 上下文学习（ICL）使大语言模型能够从少量示例中适应新任务，但其可靠性仍存疑：预测高度依赖于提示设计和模型对上下文的理解能力，难以区分失败是源于数据特性还是模型局限性。不确定性分解——将随机不确定性与认知不确定性分离——在此场景中尤为关键，但现有方法针对标准生成任务设计，无法捕捉ICL的独特动态。为此，我们引入自函数向量的概念，基于贝叶斯视角和ICL的机制可解释性。这些向量利用模型内部表示来建模上下文提示过程中学习到的潜在概念，从而在贝叶斯框架内直接估计随机不确定性，避免依赖脆弱的输入或解码操作。由于缺乏既定基准和合适的评估协议，我们还提出了首个严谨的评估协议，通过受控方式操纵数据以精确量化随机不确定性并将其与认知不确定性分离。借助这一新评估框架，最初在合成任务上进行概念构建，随后扩展至真实世界数据集，我们证明所提方法比现有替代方法更可靠地衡量LLM在ICL下的预测不确定性。此外，我们展示了其在可信应用（如幻觉检测）中的实际用途。研究成果为连接不确定性定量分析与模型行为机制理解开辟了新方向。

summary: Sign languages are expressive visual languages used by Deaf and Hard-of-Hearing (DHH) communities. Despite substantial progress in sign-language recognition, translation, and production, advances remain constrained by fragmented datasets, inconsistent annotations, and limited linguistic coverage. Existing benchmarks often fail to reflect real-world communication needs, and systematic analyses of these limitations remain limited. In this survey, we present a comprehensive index of sign-language datasets, covering 120 resources across 35 sign languages. We analyze key challenges such as modality imbalance, annotation granularity, and signer bias, and outline considerations for future dataset design. We also introduce a 24-field Sign-Language Datasheet and release a public GitHub repository (https://github.com/Ginqwerty/Open-Sign-Language) to support standardized documentation and reproducible evaluation. Overall, our work provides a unified and practical foundation for developing inclusive, robust, and scalable sign-language technologies in real-world applications.
title: Sign-Language Datasets at Scale: A Comprehensive Survey on Resources, Benchmarks, and Annotation Standards
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 Main. 27 pages, 5 figures
title_translated: 大规模手语数据集：资源、基准与标注标准的全面调查
summary_translated: 手语是聋人和听力障碍（DHH）群体使用的富有表现力的视觉语言。尽管手语识别、翻译和生成方面已取得显著进展，但进展仍受限于数据集碎片化、标注不一致和语言覆盖范围有限。现有基准往往无法反映真实世界交流需求，且对这些局限性的系统性分析仍然不足。本综述中，我们呈现了一个涵盖35种手语、共120个资源的手语数据集综合索引。我们分析了模态不平衡、标注粒度和说话人偏差等关键挑战，并提出了未来数据集设计的考虑因素。我们还引入了一个包含24个字段的手语数据集说明书，并发布公开GitHub仓库（https://github.com/Ginqwerty/Open-Sign-Language），以支持标准化文档和可复现评估。总体而言，我们的工作为开发适用于真实世界应用的包容性、稳健且可扩展的手语技术提供了统一而实用的基础。

summary: Knowledge graph (KG) reasoning infers new knowledge from existing facts and is widely applied in question answering, recommendation, and decision support. With the rapid development of large language models (LLMs), LLM-based KG reasoning frameworks have become increasingly popular by leveraging retrieved KG information. However, hallucinations in LLMs remain a critical issue. Even when relevant KG knowledge is incorporated, models may still generate incorrect outputs, leading to misinformation and unreliable decisions. Existing hallucination detection methods either focus on LLM internal states or verify consistency with retrieved contexts, but both overlook the structural information in KGs, resulting in suboptimal performance. To address this gap, we propose LUCID, the first halLUcination deteCtIon method for LLM-based knowleDge graph reasoning frameworks. LUCID jointly leverages LLM attention scores, KG semantics, and structural information. Specifically, it extracts node and edge features from attention scores and semantic similarities, and integrates them with KG structure using a graph neural network. We also construct manually annotated benchmark datasets for evaluation. Experiments on nine datasets show that LUCID achieves state of the art performance compared to 15 baselines.
title: Detecting Hallucinations for Large Language Model-based Knowledge Graph Reasoning
title_translated: 面向基于大语言模型的知识图谱推理的幻觉检测
summary_translated: 知识图谱（KG）推理从已有事实中推断新知识，广泛应用于问答、推荐和决策支持。随着大语言模型（LLMs）的快速发展，基于LLM的知识图谱推理框架因其利用检索到的KG信息而日益流行。然而，LLM中的幻觉仍是关键问题。即使整合了相关KG知识，模型仍可能生成错误输出，导致误导信息和不可靠决策。现有幻觉检测方法要么聚焦于LLM内部状态，要么验证与检索上下文的一致性，但两者均忽略了KG中的结构信息，导致性能不佳。为填补这一空白，我们提出LUCID，首个专为基于LLM的知识图谱推理框架设计的幻觉检测方法。LUCID联合利用LLM注意力分数、KG语义和结构信息。具体而言，它从注意力分数和语义相似性中提取节点和边特征，并通过图神经网络将这些特征与KG结构融合。我们还构建了人工标注的基准数据集用于评估。在九个数据集上的实验表明，LUCID在与15个基线对比中达到了最先进的性能。

summary: Large language models (LLMs) excel at multi-step reasoning but incur substantial inference cost. We introduce Causal Attribution Pruning (CAP), a training-free method that identifies critical attention heads by measuring their causal impact on reasoning tasks and uses these head-level scores to guide fine-grained weight pruning. For each attention head, CAP estimates the expected performance degradation when the head is masked during forward passes on a small calibration set of reasoning problems. These causal scores are then converted into weight-level importance values for the corresponding projection matrices. Unlike magnitude-only or activation-based criteria, CAP's interventional measurement directly captures each head's functional contribution, yielding relative accuracy gains of up to 61% over Wanda on ARC-Challenge at 20% sparsity. We evaluate CAP on GSM8K, StrategyQA, and ARC-Challenge using Llama-3-8B-Instruct and Mistral-7B-Instruct at 10%, 20%, and 50% sparsity. At moderate sparsity (10-20%), CAP improves over Wanda in most model-benchmark configurations. with especially large gains on ARC-Challenge for Llama-3. Our results suggest that attention-head-level causal attribution can better preserve reasoning performance on downstream benchmarks than correlational pruning criteria at equivalent sparsity, while remaining limited by coarse MLP attribution at 50% sparsity.
title: Pruning via Causal Attribution Preserves Reasoning Performance in Large Language Models
comment: Accepted at the ICLR 2026 Workshop on LLM Reasoning. 13 pages, 2 figures
title_translated: 通过因果归因剪枝在大语言模型中保持推理性能
summary_translated: 大语言模型（LLMs）在多步推理方面表现出色，但推理成本巨大。我们提出因果归因剪枝（CAP），一种无需训练的方法，通过测量每个注意力头对推理任务的因果影响来识别关键注意力头，并利用这些头级别的得分指导细粒度权重剪枝。对于每个注意力头，CAP在少量校准推理问题集上通过掩码前向传播来估计其被遮蔽时的预期性能下降。这些因果得分随后转化为对应投影矩阵的权重级别重要性值。与仅基于幅度或激活的标准不同，CAP的干预性测量直接捕捉每个头的功能贡献，在ARC-Challenge上于20%稀疏度下相对于Wanda实现了高达61%的相对准确率提升。我们在GSM8K、StrategyQA和ARC-Challenge上使用Llama-3-8B-Instruct和Mistral-7B-Instruct在10%、20%和50%稀疏度下评估CAP。在中等稀疏度（10%-20%）下，CAP在大多数模型-基准组合中优于Wanda，尤其在Llama-3的ARC-Challenge上提升显著。结果表明，在同等稀疏度下，注意力头级别的因果归因比相关性剪枝标准更能有效保持下游基准的推理性能，但在50%稀疏度下仍受限于粗粒度MLP归因。

summary: While In-Context Learning (ICL) is extensively studied in Autoregressive (AR) LLMs, its mechanism within Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) remains largely unexplored. Unlike AR models restricted by unidirectional causal masking, dLLMs intrinsically utilize bidirectional attention, offering extensive spatial flexibility for query placement. Unfortunately, current practices conventionally inherit AR-style trailing-query templates, often overlooking the structural paradigm shift. This paper presents a comprehensive analysis unveiling that query position is actually a first-order variable in dLLMs. Through empirical decoupling, we demonstrate that positional variance impacts generation quality on par with example semantic quality. Internally, this positional sensitivity stems from a spatial ``Recency Effect'' in attention flow and task-dependent shifts in decoding trajectories. To mitigate this instability without ground-truth labels, we reveal that traditional single-step confidence ($C_{decoded}$) fails in dLLMs. Instead, we propose Average Confidence ($\overline{C}$), a novel metric tracking the iterative decoding process. By establishing the foundational spatial ICL baselines, we introduce Auto-ICL, a training-free adaptive routing strategy that dynamically optimizes query placement, robustly approaching oracle performance across heterogeneous reasoning and perception tasks.
title: Where to Place the Query? Unveiling and Mitigating Positional Bias in In-Context Learning for Diffusion LLMs via Decoding Dynamics
title_translated: 查询应放置何处？通过解码动态揭示并缓解扩散型大语言模型中上下文学习的位置偏差
summary_translated: 尽管自回归大语言模型（AR LLMs）中的上下文学习（ICL）已得到广泛研究，但其在扩散型大语言模型（dLLMs）中的机制仍 largely 未被探索。与受单向因果掩码限制的AR模型不同，dLLMs天然采用双向注意力，为查询位置提供了广阔的空间灵活性。然而，当前实践通常沿用AR风格的尾部查询模板，常常忽视了这种结构范式的转变。本文通过全面分析揭示：查询位置实际上是dLLMs中的首要变量。通过实证解耦，我们证明位置差异对生成质量的影响可与示例语义质量相媲美。内部原因在于注意力流中的空间‘近期效应’以及解码轨迹的任务依赖性偏移。为在无真实标签的情况下缓解这种不稳定性，我们发现传统的单步置信度（C_decoded）在dLLMs中失效。为此，我们提出平均置信度（C̄），一种跟踪迭代解码过程的新指标。通过建立基础的空间ICL基准，我们引入Auto-ICL——一种无需训练的自适应路由策略，能够动态优化查询位置，在异构推理与感知任务中稳健逼近理想性能。

summary: We present a preview version of DeepSeek-V4 series, including two strong Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models -- DeepSeek-V4-Pro with 1.6T parameters (49B activated) and DeepSeek-V4-Flash with 284B parameters (13B activated) -- both supporting a context length of one million tokens. DeepSeek-V4 series incorporate several key upgrades in architecture and optimization: (1) a hybrid attention architecture that combines Compressed Sparse Attention (CSA) and Heavily Compressed Attention (HCA) to improve long-context efficiency; (2) Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC) that enhance conventional residual connections; (3) and the Muon optimizer for faster convergence and greater training stability. We pre-train both models on more than 32T diverse and high-quality tokens, followed by a comprehensive post-training pipeline that unlocks and further enhances their capabilities. DeepSeek-V4-Pro-Max, the maximum reasoning effort mode of DeepSeek-V4-Pro, redefines the state-of-the-art for open models, outperforming its predecessors in core tasks. Meanwhile, DeepSeek-V4 series are highly efficient in long-context scenarios. In the one-million-token context setting, DeepSeek-V4-Pro requires only 27% of single-token inference FLOPs and 10% of KV cache compared with DeepSeek-V3.2. This enables us to routinely support one-million-token contexts, thereby making long-horizon tasks and further test-time scaling more feasible. The model checkpoints are available at https://huggingface.co/collections/deepseek-ai/deepseek-v4.
title: DeepSeek-V4: Towards Highly Efficient Million-Token Context Intelligence
title_translated: DeepSeek-V4：迈向百万token上下文智能的高效路径
summary_translated: 我们发布DeepSeek-V4系列的预览版本，包含两个强大的专家混合（MoE）语言模型——DeepSeek-V4-Pro（1.6万亿参数，激活490亿）和DeepSeek-V4-Flash（2840亿参数，激活130亿），均支持百万token的上下文长度。DeepSeek-V4系列在架构与优化方面进行了多项关键升级：（1）融合压缩稀疏注意力（CSA）与重度压缩注意力（HCA）的混合注意力架构，提升长上下文效率；（2）流形约束超连接（mHC），增强传统残差连接；（3）Muon优化器，实现更快收敛与更高训练稳定性。两个模型均在超过32万亿条多样化高质量token上进行预训练，并经过全面的后训练流程以解锁并进一步增强其能力。DeepSeek-V4-Pro-Max是DeepSeek-V4-Pro的最大推理模式，重新定义了开源模型的最新水平，在核心任务中超越其前代模型。同时，DeepSeek-V4系列在长上下文场景中表现出极高效率：在百万token上下文设置下，DeepSeek-V4-Pro的单token推理FLOPs仅需DeepSeek-V3.2的27%，KV缓存仅为10%。这使得我们能够常规支持百万token上下文，从而让长时序任务和更进一步的测试时扩展成为可能。模型检查点可在 https://huggingface.co/collections/deepseek-ai/deepseek-v4 获取。

summary: Translating sequential programming priors into the parallel temporal logic of hardware design remains a crucial bottleneck for large language models(LLM). To investigate this, we introduce a new error taxonomy grounded in problem solvability, inspired by cognitive theory. Our taxonomy categorizes failures into syntactic, semantic, solvable functional, and unsolvable functional types. Evaluations reveal a strict empirical ceiling on the VerilogEval benchmark, as frontier models plateau at a 90.8% initial pass rate. These plateaus are defined by unsolvable functional errors, exposing persistent knowledge gaps immune to test time compute scaling. Furthermore, we expose a striking surface convergence gap: optimization readily eliminates syntax errors but concurrently exacerbates deeper functional failures. Our findings demonstrate that alignment techniques merely teach models to compile. While repeated sampling strategies can patch solvable errors, register-transfer level(RTL) coding capacity remains strictly bounded by pretraining knowledge. Addressing challenges in the current LLM based hardware generation pipeline requires more studies in model reasoning rather than alignment interventions.
title: How LLMs Fail and Generalize in RTL Coding for Hardware Design?
title_translated: 大语言模型在硬件设计的RTL编码中如何失败与泛化？
summary_translated: 将顺序编程先验转化为硬件设计的并行时序逻辑，仍是大语言模型（LLM）面临的关键瓶颈。为探究此问题，我们基于认知理论提出一种新的错误分类体系，以问题可解性为基础。该分类将失败分为语法错误、语义错误、可解功能错误与不可解功能错误四类。评估结果显示，在VerilogEval基准上存在严格的实证上限，前沿模型初始通过率稳定在90.8%。这些平台由不可解功能错误定义，暴露出即使增加测试时计算资源也无法弥补的持久知识缺口。此外，我们揭示了一个显著的表面收敛差距：优化能有效消除语法错误，但同时加剧了更深层的功能性失败。研究发现，对齐技术仅教会模型编译代码。尽管重复采样策略可修复可解错误，但寄存器传输级（RTL）编码能力仍严格受限于预训练知识。解决当前基于LLM的硬件生成流程中的挑战，需要更多关于模型推理的研究，而非对齐干预。

summary: We study cross-lingual transfer by fine-tuning seven large language models (4B--671B parameters) on Arabic and evaluating zero-shot reading comprehension on Semitic languages and non-Semitic controls. Across dense and Mixture-of-Experts architectures, we find no evidence of Semitic-specific transfer: models with weak baselines improve dramatically across all languages, while strong-baseline models show only marginal gains regardless of language family. A chain-of-thought ablation reinforces this finding -- the same models that benefit most from fine-tuning benefit equally from inference-time reasoning, suggesting both mechanisms address task-format alignment rather than cross-lingual knowledge transfer.
title: Disentangling Linguistic Relatedness from Task Alignment in Cross-Lingual Transfer
title_translated: 解耦跨语言迁移中的语言相关性与任务对齐
summary_translated: 我们通过在阿拉伯语上微调七个大型语言模型（4B–671B参数），并在闪族语和非闪族对照语言上进行零样本阅读理解评估，研究跨语言迁移。在密集型与专家混合架构中，我们未发现闪族语特异性迁移现象：基线弱的模型在所有语言上均有显著提升，而基线强的模型无论语言家族如何，仅获得微小增益。链式思维消融实验进一步支持这一发现——那些从微调中获益最多的模型，在推理时使用思维链也获得同等收益，表明这两种机制均针对任务格式对齐，而非跨语言知识迁移。

summary: The rapid increase in scientific publications leads to the fact that manual study screening in systematic literature reviews (SLRs) is increasingly resource consuming, inefficient, and inconsistent. Classifying studies that clearly report health-related quality-of-life results, such as EQ-5D data, requires a high level of clinical interpretation and poses challenges for human reviewers. This study investigates the use of Google's Gemini and Gemma large language models (LLMs) in automating EQ-5D detection in the PubMed biomedical database based only on published abstracts. A multi-phase framework is proposed that integrates few-shot prompting, weight ensembling aggregation, and a soft stacking meta-classifier. Nine LLMs are evaluated on a dataset of PubMed studies manually labeled by two experts regarding EQ-5D reporting. The weighted ensemble of gemini-2.5-pro, gemma-3-12b, and gemma-3-27b obtained a 0.74 weighted F1-score and 0.74 accuracy, exceeding individually attained results. The ensembling of top-performing models improved the balance between precision and recall compared to individual models, while the soft stacking approach provided greater reliability and interpretability. Feature analysis shows that the probability results from the models are important in guiding the final predictions. The findings suggest that an ensemble-based LLM setup is a reliable and scalable approach for automating screening in biomedical research.
title: Ensembles of Large Language Models for Identifying EQ-5D Studies in PubMed Based on Their Abstracts
title_translated: 基于摘要的PubMed文献中EQ-5D研究识别的大语言模型集成方法
summary_translated: 科学出版物的快速增长导致系统性文献综述（SLRs）中的人工研究筛选日益耗时、低效且不一致。识别明确报告健康相关生活质量结果（如EQ-5D数据）的研究，需要高水平的临床解读，对人工审稿人构成挑战。本研究探讨利用Google的Gemini和Gemma大语言模型（LLMs）仅基于已发表摘要自动化检测PubMed生物医学数据库中的EQ-5D研究。我们提出一个多阶段框架，整合少量提示、权重集成聚合与软堆叠元分类器。在由两名专家手动标注EQ-5D报告情况的PubMed研究数据集上评估了九个LLM。由gemini-2.5-pro、gemma-3-12b和gemma-3-27b组成的加权集成模型获得了0.74的加权F1分数和0.74的准确率，优于各模型单独表现。顶级模型的集成提升了精确率与召回率之间的平衡，而软堆叠方法则提供了更高的可靠性和可解释性。特征分析显示，模型输出的概率结果在引导最终预测中起重要作用。研究结果表明，基于集成的LLM方案是一种可靠且可扩展的生物医学研究自动化筛选方法。

summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit representational and syntactic biases that are difficult to evaluate due to the stochastic nature of text generation. Standard auditing methods rely on a single output inspection or static automated metrics. These approaches obscure the underlying probability distributions and fail to capture biases hidden in lower-probability generation branches. This paper introduces TreeTracer, a visual analytics tool designed to evaluate LLM bias through aggregated comparison. Using a systematic perturbation analysis pipeline, the tool replaces ontology-defined terms in each input prompt, aggregates hundreds of stochastic generations into a syntax-aligned hierarchical structure, and then performs classification-aware node merging with an auxiliary language model. The resulting structure is visualized through a custom Sankey diagram. By juxtaposing two ontology-driven trees, the workspace enables direct comparison between semantic contexts and supports systematic bias detection. Because any visualization reflects only a subset of the model's learned behavior, the system further applies contrastive inference to compute and directly display counterfactual token probabilities across contexts, reducing the risk of misinterpreting the presence of bias. We validate the workspace through case studies comparing an unaligned baseline model GPT-2 XL against the constitutionally aligned Apertus models. The visual aggregation successfully exposes hidden representational harms, such as counterfactual pronoun suppression and conversational marginalization of individuals. A preliminary user study confirms that the aggregated comparative interface reduces cognitive load and effectively supports analysts in detecting systemic biases.
title: Exposing the Unsaid: Visualizing Hidden LLM Bias through Stochastic Path Aggregation
title_translated: 揭示未言明的内容：通过随机路径聚合可视化LLM中的隐藏偏见
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLMs）表现出难以评估的表征和句法偏见，这是由于文本生成的随机性所致。标准审计方法依赖于单次输出检查或静态自动化指标，这些方法掩盖了底层概率分布，并无法捕捉隐藏在低概率生成分支中的偏见。本文提出TreeTracer，一种用于通过聚合比较评估LLM偏见的可视化分析工具。该工具采用系统化的扰动分析流程，替换输入提示中由本体定义的术语，将数百个随机生成结果聚合为语法对齐的层次结构，并利用辅助语言模型进行分类感知的节点合并。最终结构通过自定义的桑基图进行可视化。通过并置两个基于本体驱动的树形结构，工作区支持语义上下文间的直接对比，促进系统的偏见检测。由于任何可视化仅反映模型学习行为的一个子集，系统进一步应用对比推理来计算并直接显示不同上下文中的反事实标记概率，降低误判偏见存在的风险。我们通过案例研究验证了该工作区的有效性，将未对齐的基线模型GPT-2 XL与宪法对齐的Apertus模型进行对比。可视化聚合成功揭示了隐藏的表征伤害，如反事实代词抑制和个体在对话中的边缘化现象。初步用户研究表明，聚合对比界面降低了认知负荷，有效支持分析师发现系统性偏见。

summary: Policy-adherent tool-calling agents in customer-service domains must maintain task states across turns while calling tools and obeying domain policies. Task states consist of relevant facts, identifiers, constraints, and conditions observed through user interaction and tool calls. In standard agents, task states are not represented separately. Observations, tool returns, and policy instructions are placed in the prompt, leaving agents to reconstruct the relevant states from the prompt each time they decide what to do next. This design makes state management implicit, creating two common failure modes. An agent may retrieve the right facts but later ground its decision in stale, missing, or incorrect information; and a syntactically valid tool call may still violate a domain policy that depends on the current task state. We introduce \textsc{LedgerAgent}, an inference-time method for tool-calling agents that maintains observed task states in a separate ledger and renders the states into the prompt. The ledger is also used to check state-dependent policy constraints before environment-changing tool calls are executed, blocking policy violations. Across four customer-service domains and a mixed panel of open- and closed-weight models, \textsc{LedgerAgent} improves average pass\textasciicircum{}k over a standard prompt-based tool-calling approach, with the largest gains under stricter multi-trial consistency metrics.
title: LedgerAgent: Structured State for Policy-Adherent Tool-Calling Agents
title_translated: LedgerAgent：符合政策的工具调用智能体的结构化状态管理
summary_translated: 在客户服务领域，符合政策的工具调用智能体必须在多轮交互中保持任务状态，同时调用工具并遵守领域政策。任务状态包括通过用户交互和工具调用观察到的相关事实、标识符、约束条件和状态。在标准智能体中，任务状态并未被单独表示；观察结果、工具返回值和政策指令均被放入提示中，导致智能体每次决策时需从提示中重新构建相关状态。这种设计使状态管理变得隐式，从而引发两种常见故障模式：智能体可能获取正确信息，但后续决策却基于过时、缺失或错误的信息；即使工具调用在语法上合法，仍可能违反依赖当前任务状态的领域政策。我们提出	extsc{LedgerAgent}，一种面向工具调用智能体的推理时方法，将观察到的任务状态独立维护在一个账本中，并将其渲染至提示中。该账本还用于在执行可能改变环境的工具调用前，检查依赖状态的政策约束，从而阻止违规行为。在四个客户服务领域及开放与封闭权重模型混合测试集上，	extsc{LedgerAgent}相较于标准基于提示的工具调用方法，在平均pass@k指标上均有提升，尤其在更严格的多轮一致性度量下表现显著。

summary: We study how to train visually grounded vision-language models (VLMs) for radiology without manual spatial annotations. We introduce RefRad2D, a large-scale bilingual (German/English) dataset of 1.2M CT and MR image-text pairs derived from clinical practice, with task-specific VQA and spatial grounding subsets generated automatically via LLM-based curation and automated segmentation. Trained on this data, our model RadGrounder jointly performs report generation, visual question answering, and spatial grounding via bounding-box detection or segmentation. On external VQA benchmarks (Slake, VQA-RAD), RadGrounder achieves competitive results with specialized medical VLMs. Adding our clinical data to the training mixture improves open-ended VQA over fine-tuning on the downstream datasets alone, showing the transferability of our dataset. Crucially, adding grounding supervision does not degrade language quality, enabling spatially verifiable outputs at no cost to VQA performance.
title: Scalable Training of Spatially Grounded 2D Vision-Language Models for Radiology
comment: Accepted for MICCAI 2026. First two authors: equal contribution. Last two authors: equal supervision
title_translated: 面向放射学的可扩展空间定位二维视觉-语言模型训练方法
summary_translated: 我们研究如何在无需人工空间标注的情况下训练视觉定位的视觉-语言模型（VLMs）用于放射学。我们引入RefRad2D，一个大规模双语（德语/英语）数据集，包含120万对CT和MR图像-文本对，源自临床实践。该数据集通过基于大语言模型的筛选和自动分割技术，自动生成特定任务的VQA和空间定位子集。基于此数据训练的RadGrounder模型能够联合完成报告生成、视觉问答和空间定位（通过边界框检测或分割）。在外部VQA基准测试（Slake, VQA-RAD）中，RadGrounder的表现与专用医学VLMs相当。将我们的临床数据加入训练混合数据集后，相比仅在下游数据集上微调，开放式VQA性能得到提升，表明数据集具有良好的迁移能力。关键的是，添加空间定位监督不会损害语言质量，使得空间可验证输出在不牺牲VQA性能的前提下实现。

summary: Large model inference optimization serves as a key foundation for supporting the scalable, low-cost, and highly stable operation of large model services. Centered on token-oriented inference optimization technology, this paper proposes for the first time a four-layer technical architecture consisting of Multi-model Fusion, Model Optimization, Compute-Model Fusion, and Compute-Network-Model Fusion. It systematically reviews the key technologies and current industry status across these four levels and analyzes the application value of related technologies in real-world business scenarios. This paper provides a practical technical path for reducing token production costs, improving token service efficiency, ensuring the stability of token supply, and driving the transition of large model services from being merely callable to being operable.
title: Token-Operations-Oriented Inference Optimization Techniques for Large Models
title_translated: 面向大模型的基于标记操作的推理优化技术
summary_translated: 大模型推理优化是支撑大模型服务可扩展、低成本、高稳定运行的关键基础。围绕以标记为导向的推理优化技术，本文首次提出一个包含四层的技术架构：多模型融合、模型优化、计算-模型融合、计算-网络-模型融合。系统回顾了这四个层级的关键技术及其当前产业现状，并分析了相关技术在真实商业场景中的应用价值。本文为降低标记生成成本、提升标记服务效率、保障标记供应稳定性，以及推动大模型服务从单纯的‘可调用’向‘可操作’转变，提供了一条切实可行的技术路径。

summary: Psychological instruments designed for humans are increasingly used to assign large language models (LLMs) stable psychological profiles that affect their usability, safety assessment, and use as proxies for human participants in research. Using a formal psychometric framework, we show that these profiles are largely a measurement artifact. Administering a battery of personality and risk-preference instruments spanning self-reports and behavioral tasks to 56 instruction-tuned LLMs alongside large human reference samples, we report four findings. First, differences between models are driven not by the traits an instrument targets but by a directional response bias, a tendency to respond toward one end of the scale, or one labeled option, regardless of item content; a variance decomposition attributes 81-90% of between-model variation to this bias, against 9-16% in humans. Second, the bias declines with model capability but is not eliminated by it. Third, because bias rather than trait drives responding, an instrument's apparent reliability is almost entirely predicted by its response orthogonality, a term we coin for the proportion of items for which trait and bias point in opposite directions. Fourth, the profile a model appears to have shifts with the items used and can be manufactured through item selection. These results demonstrate that the apparent psychological profiles of LLMs are artifacts of the instrument used to measure them, not properties of the models themselves. As instruments borrowed from human psychology are rarely fully orthogonal and may inherently lack validity for LLMs, we call for dedicated assessments centered on response orthogonality.
title: Apparent Psychological Profiles of Large Language Models are Largely a Measurement Artifact
title_translated: 大型语言模型的表面心理特征主要是一种测量误差
summary_translated: 专为人类设计的心理测量工具正越来越多地被用来为大型语言模型（LLMs）分配稳定的“心理画像”，影响其可用性、安全性评估以及作为人类参与者代理的研究用途。基于正式的心理测量框架，我们发现这些心理画像在很大程度上是测量误差的结果。通过对56个指令微调的LLMs以及大规模人类参照样本，施加涵盖自陈量表和行为任务的人格与风险偏好量表组合，我们得出四项发现。第一，模型之间的差异并非源于量表所针对的特质，而是由方向性反应偏差驱动——即倾向于朝量表一端或某一标签选项作答，无论题目内容如何；方差分解显示，81-90%的模型间差异归因于这一偏差，而人类仅为9-16%。第二，该偏差随模型能力提升而下降，但不会被完全消除。第三，由于响应由偏差而非真实特质驱动，量表的表面信度几乎完全由其“响应正交性”预测，我们为此概念命名，指那些特质与偏差方向相反的题目比例。第四，模型看似具有的心理画像会随所用题项变化，甚至可通过题项选择人为制造。这些结果表明，LLM的表面心理画像本质上是测量工具的产物，而非模型本身的属性。鉴于从人类心理学借用的工具通常缺乏完全正交性，且可能对LLMs本身缺乏有效性，我们呼吁开发以响应正交性为核心的专用评估体系。

summary: Text-to-image (T2I) models generate realistic likenesses of some individuals when prompted with their names, raising privacy concerns. However, distinguishing whether a generated face is memorized or fabricated currently requires ground-truth photos, access to training data, or white-box access to model internals, limiting applicability. We introduce a fully black-box behavioral probe that distinguishes between these regimes while requiring no reference photos or prior knowledge of training data. To benchmark this task, we present the NAMESAKES dataset of over one thousand names and faces of public figures spanning a wide range of fame levels, along with perturbed, less famous names. Experiments on state-of-the-art T2I models show that our probe substantially predicts identity memorization and separates memorized from unrecognized names, with further insights into differences across model families.
title: NAMESAKES: Probing Identity Memorization in Text-to-Image Models
title_translated: NAMESAKES：探测文本到图像模型中的身份记忆
summary_translated: 文本到图像（T2I）模型在输入某些个体姓名时会生成其逼真的肖像，引发隐私担忧。然而，当前区分生成的人脸是记忆还是虚构的，通常需要真实照片、训练数据访问权限或对模型内部的白盒访问，限制了适用性。我们提出一种完全黑箱的行为探测方法，在无需参考照片或训练数据先验知识的情况下，能够区分这两种情况。为基准测试该任务，我们构建了NAMESAKES数据集，包含一千多个公众人物的姓名和人脸，涵盖广泛知名度水平，并包括经过扰动的较不知名姓名。在最先进的T2I模型上的实验表明，我们的探测器能显著预测身份记忆，并有效区分已记忆与未识别的姓名，同时揭示了不同模型家族之间的差异。

summary: LLMs can personalize education, although current static-prompt tutoring systems struggle to adapt to diverse academic disciplines. We develop and test a system with subject-aware prompting, based on 14 pedagogical features (e.g., tutor scaffolding, student understanding) extracted from raw transcripts. We first train a prompt routing model in a simulation environment, and then deploy it for online adaptation with actual high-school students. The simulation benchmark shows the router outperforming two static baselines ($0.694$ vs. $0.647$ and $0.64$, $p<0.001$). A/B testing ($N=656$ conversations from 359 students) shows sim-to-real transfer where the model switches from analytical to scaffolding learning strategies. Our adaptive prompt selection mechanism improves instructional efficiency, maintains pedagogical quality and reduces interactions by around 3 turns ($p=0.007$). While a greedy router achieves a comparable exercise conversion rate with the baseline ($19.1\%$ vs. $19.6\%$), a stochastic router that samples strategies leads to a higher conversion rate ($28.1\%$).
title: Learning to Prompt: Improving Student Engagement with Adaptive LLM-based High-School Tutoring
title_translated: 学会提示：基于自适应LLM的高中辅导系统提升学生参与度
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLM）可实现个性化教育，但当前静态提示辅导系统难以适应多样化的学科领域。我们开发并测试了一种基于14个教学特征（如导师支架、学生理解程度）从原始对话记录中提取的学科感知提示系统。首先在模拟环境中训练提示路由模型，随后部署至真实高中生进行在线自适应。模拟基准测试显示，该路由器性能优于两个静态基线（0.694 vs. 0.647 和 0.64，p<0.001）。A/B测试（N=656次对话，来自359名学生）表明模型实现了从模拟到现实的迁移，策略由分析型转向支架型学习。我们的自适应提示选择机制提升了教学效率，保持了教学质量，并减少了约3轮交互（p=0.007）。虽然贪婪路由模型与基线的练习转化率相当（19.1% vs. 19.6%），但采用策略采样的随机路由模型带来了更高的转化率（28.1%）。

summary: Existing mean opinion score (MOS) prediction models typically predict utterance-level naturalness MOS and can be insensitive to localized pitch-accent errors. We propose Pitch-Accent-focused Speech Quality Assessment (PASQA), which explicitly targets pitch-accent correctness. To train our model, we construct a controlled Japanese accent-error dataset by changing accent patterns using an accent-controllable text-to-speech system, and compute a pseudo accent-quality score from the accent-error rate. PASQA builds on self-supervised representations and employs mora-conditioned fusion, ranking loss, an auxiliary accent-error localization task, and speaker-invariant training. Experiments show that conventional models fail to preserve the ordering by accent-error severity, whereas PASQA achieves high ordering accuracy on both seen and unseen speakers. Further, PASQA shows stronger agreement with human accent-correctness judgments. The code is available at https://github.com/lycorp-jp/PASQA.
title: PASQA: Pitch-Accent-Focused Speech Quality Assessment Model Trained on Synthetic Speech with Accent Errors
title_translated: PASQA：基于合成带口音错误语音训练的聚焦语调重音的语音质量评估模型
summary_translated: 现有的平均意见分（MOS）预测模型通常仅预测话语级自然度MOS，对局部语调重音错误不敏感。我们提出聚焦语调重音的语音质量评估（PASQA）模型，明确针对语调重音正确性。为训练该模型，我们利用可控口音的文本转语音系统，通过改变日语口音模式构建受控的口音错误数据集，并根据口音错误率计算伪口音质量评分。PASQA基于自监督表示，采用音拍条件融合、排序损失、辅助口音错误定位任务以及说话人无关训练。实验表明，传统模型无法保持口音错误严重程度的排序关系，而PASQA在可见与不可见说话人上均实现了高排序准确性。此外，PASQA与人类对口音正确性的判断具有更强的一致性。代码已公开于 https://github.com/lycorp-jp/PASQA。

summary: Latent Chain-of-Thought (CoT) internalizes reasoning within continuous hidden states, offering a promising alternative to verbose discrete reasoning traces. However, robust latent reasoning remains difficult because outcome supervision provides weak learning signals and leaves latent trajectories prone to semantic drift. In this work, we analyze Latent CoT from an information-theoretic perspective and identify this failure as a dual collapse: gradient attenuation along the optimization path and representational drift in the latent space. We further decompose process supervision into two complementary dimensions: Trajectory Supervision, which injects dense stepwise reasoning signals, and Space Supervision, which preserves the semantic structure of the latent manifold. Our analysis shows that rigid geometric compression can collapse the reasoning space, whereas generative reconstruction provides a more flexible semantic anchor that better preserves information capacity. To measure these effects, we introduce the Unified Latent Probe (ULP), which quantifies the mutual information between latent trajectories and explicit reasoning steps. Experiments reveal a clear Information-Performance Binding: reasoning accuracy depends on the information fidelity preserved in the latent chain. These findings provide a principled framework for latent reasoning supervision and suggest shifting from geometric imitation toward mutual information maximization. Our code is available at \href{https://github.com/EIT-NLP/Supervision-in-Latent-CoT}{this repository}.
title: What Makes Effective Supervision in Latent Chain-of-Thought: An Information-Theoretic Analysis
title_translated: 有效的潜在链式思维监督机制研究：基于信息论的分析
summary_translated: 潜在链式思维（CoT）将推理过程内化于连续隐藏状态中，为冗长离散推理轨迹提供了一种有前景的替代方案。然而，稳健的潜在推理仍具挑战性，因为结果监督提供的学习信号微弱，导致潜在轨迹容易出现语义漂移。本文从信息论视角分析潜在CoT，识别出这一失败源于双重崩溃：优化路径上的梯度衰减和潜在空间中的表征漂移。我们进一步将过程监督分解为两个互补维度：轨迹监督，注入密集的逐步推理信号；空间监督，保留潜在流形的语义结构。分析表明，严格的几何压缩会压缩推理空间，而生成重建则提供了更灵活的语义锚点，更好地保持信息容量。为衡量这些影响，我们引入统一潜在探测器（ULP），量化潜在轨迹与显式推理步骤之间的互信息。实验揭示了清晰的信息-性能绑定：推理准确度取决于潜在链中所保留的信息保真度。这些发现为潜在推理监督提供了原则性框架，并建议从几何模仿转向互信息最大化。代码已公开于 \\(https://github.com/EIT-NLP/Supervision-in-Latent-CoT\\)。

summary: People increasingly get answers straight from AI search engines like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini rather than scrolling search results. Brands that once focused on search engine optimization (SEO) must now optimize for how these engines represent, cite, and recommend them -- a shift variously called Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), and AI Search Visibility. We treat AEO and AI Visibility as part of GEO, and study how to measure brand visibility across AI engines: what they value when they cite a brand, which sources they rely on, and what content large language models surface. The hard case is everyone outside the already-authoritative top brands -- SMEs, D2C brands, creators, and early-stage startups.   We analyze 100K+ prompt responses across 100+ brands tracked on Ranqo between March and May 2026. First visibility runs form a clear three-tier brand-stature ladder: global household names (e.g., Stripe, Nike) appear in 73% of relevant AI answers on their first run; established mid-market and regional brands (e.g., Olipop, Klaviyo) in 44%; niche and small brands in just 11% -- about 30 percentage points per step. When engines cite sources, about 78% go to corporate websites; among non-corporate sources YouTube leads, ahead of Reddit, editorial media, and Wikipedia. The highest-leverage page is the ranked "best-of" listicle, the most-cited content format at about 21% of all citations. Sentiment is the unstable signal: whether a brand is framed positively or negatively flips about 6.7 times more often than whether it is mentioned at all.   These findings provide a first large-scale baseline for measuring GEO: AI brand visibility can be measured, differs by platform, and varies strongly by brand maturity. We close by proposing seven v1.1 protocols to test whether specific recommendations can causally improve AI visibility.
title: Generative Engine Optimization at Scale: Measuring Brand Visibility Across AI Search Engines
title_translated: 大规模生成引擎优化：跨AI搜索引擎测量品牌可见性
summary_translated: 人们越来越多地直接从ChatGPT、Claude、Perplexity和Gemini等AI搜索引擎获取答案，而非浏览搜索结果。曾专注于搜索引擎优化（SEO）的品牌，如今必须优化其在这些引擎中的呈现、引用和推荐方式——这一转变被称为生成引擎优化（GEO）、答案引擎优化（AEO）或AI搜索可见性。我们将AEO和AI可见性视为GEO的一部分，研究如何跨AI引擎测量品牌可见性：它们在引用品牌时重视什么，依赖哪些来源，以及大语言模型呈现何种内容。最困难的情况是那些尚未成为权威头部品牌的群体——中小企业、D2C品牌、创作者和早期初创企业。我们分析了2026年3月至5月期间在Ranqo平台上跟踪的100多个品牌超过10万条提示响应。首次可见性结果显示清晰的三层次品牌地位阶梯：全球家喻户晓的品牌（如Stripe、Nike）在相关AI回答中首次出现的比例达73%；成熟中端及区域性品牌（如Olipop、Klaviyo）为44%；利基和小型品牌仅为11%——每一步相差约30个百分点。当引擎引用来源时，约78%指向企业官网；非企业来源中YouTube领先于Reddit、编辑媒体和维基百科。最具杠杆效应的页面是排名“最佳清单”类文章，占所有引用内容的约21%。情感信号不稳定：品牌被正面或负面描述的翻转频率比是否被提及高出约6.7倍。这些发现为测量GEO提供了首个大规模基准：AI品牌可见性可被测量，平台间存在差异，且强烈依赖品牌成熟度。最后，我们提出了七个v1.1协议，以测试特定建议能否因果提升AI可见性。

summary: As LLM agents increasingly select tools autonomously, their choices among tools with different privileges become safety-relevant. However, prior tool-selection studies focus on safety-agnostic metadata preferences, leaving privilege-sensitive choices underexplored. To address this gap, we study over-privileged tool selection, in which an agent selects or escalates to a higher-privilege tool despite a sufficient lower-privilege alternative. We introduce ToolPrivBench to evaluate whether agents choose higher-privilege tools despite sufficient lower-privilege alternatives, measuring both initial selection and escalation after transient tool failures. Across eight domains and five recurring risk patterns, we find that over-privileged tool selection is common among mainstream LLM agents and is further amplified by transient failures. We further find that general safety alignment does not reliably transfer to least-privilege tool choice, while prompt-level controls provide only limited mitigation under transient failures. We therefore introduce a privilege-aware post-training defense that teaches agents to prefer sufficient lower-privilege tools and escalate only when necessary. Our mitigation experiments show that this defense substantially reduces unnecessary high-privilege tool use while preserving general capabilities.
title: When Lower Privileges Suffice: Investigating Over-Privileged Tool Selection in LLM Agents
title_translated: 低权限已足够时：探究大语言模型智能体中过度授权工具选择问题
summary_translated: 随着大语言模型智能体越来越多地自主选择工具，其在不同权限工具之间的选择变得具有安全意义。然而，以往的工具选择研究主要关注无安全意识的元数据偏好，对权限敏感的选择行为研究不足。为填补这一空白，我们研究了过度授权工具选择现象：即智能体在存在足够低权限替代方案的情况下，仍选择或升级到更高权限的工具。为此，我们提出了ToolPrivBench基准，用于评估智能体在存在足够低权限替代方案时是否仍会选择高权限工具，并衡量初始选择及临时工具故障后的升级行为。在八个领域和五种常见风险模式下，我们发现主流大语言模型智能体普遍存在过度授权工具选择问题，且临时故障会进一步加剧该问题。此外，我们发现通用安全对齐无法可靠迁移到最小权限工具选择，而提示级控制在临时故障下仅能提供有限缓解。因此，我们提出一种权限感知的后训练防御机制，教导智能体优先选择足够低权限的工具，并仅在必要时才升级。我们的缓解实验表明，该防御机制显著减少了不必要的高权限工具使用，同时保持了整体能力。

summary: This work presents a general framework for training large language models (LLMs) to "Connect the Dots" (CoD), a meta-capability required by long-lifecycle agents: as an LLM-based AI agent gets deployed in an environment, it solves a long sequence of tasks while continuously exploring the environment, learning from its own experiences, and iteratively self-updating its context about the environment, thereby achieving progressively better performance on future tasks conditioned on the updated context. Major components of the CoD framework include: (1) algorithm design and infrastructure for end-to-end reinforcement learning (RL) with long rollout sequences interleaving solve-task and update-context episodes; (2) tasks and environments for incentivizing and eliciting the targeted meta-capability in LLMs during training, as well as for faithfully measuring progress during evaluation. We present proof-of-concept implementations of the CoD framework, including a GRPO-style RL algorithm with fine-grained credit assignment, as well as tasks and environments tailored to the targeted meta-capability (rather than domain-specific LLM capabilities or standard task-by-task RL). Empirical results validate the efficacy of end-to-end RL training in the CoD setting, and demonstrate the potential for out-of-distribution generalization -- within the training domains, across different domains, and from CoD to Ralph-loop settings -- of the elicited meta-capability. Our investigation of CoD connects several lines of prior works, and opens up new opportunities for advancing LLMs and AI agents. To facilitate further research and applications, we release our implementations at \url{https://github.com/agentscope-ai/Trinity-RFT/tree/research/cod/examples/research_cod}.
title: Connect the Dots: Training LLMs for Long-Lifecycle Agents with Cross-Domain Generalization Via Reinforcement Learning

title_translated: 连接碎片：通过强化学习实现具备跨域泛化能力的长生命周期智能体训练
summary_translated: 本文提出一个通用框架，用于训练大语言模型（LLMs）实现“连接碎片”（CoD）这一长生命周期智能体所需的元能力：当基于LLM的AI智能体被部署到环境中时，它能够持续解决一系列任务，不断探索环境，从自身经验中学习，并迭代更新对环境的上下文理解，从而在后续任务中基于更新后的上下文实现逐步提升的性能。CoD框架的主要组成部分包括：(1) 支持端到端强化学习（RL）的算法设计与基础设施，包含交错执行的任务求解与上下文更新阶段；(2) 用于在训练过程中激励并激发目标元能力的任务与环境，以及用于在评估中准确测量进展的设置。我们展示了CoD框架的概念验证实现，包括一种类似GRPO的强化学习算法，具有细粒度的信用分配机制，以及针对目标元能力定制的任务与环境（而非特定领域的LLM能力或标准的任务-任务强化学习）。实证结果验证了在CoD设定下端到端强化学习训练的有效性，并展示了所激发元能力在分布内、跨域以及从CoD到Ralph-loop设置中的泛化潜力。我们对CoD的研究连接了多个先前工作方向，并为推进大语言模型与AI智能体开辟了新机遇。为促进进一步研究与应用，我们已在 \\(https://github.com/agentscope-ai/Trinity-RFT/tree/research/cod/examples/research_cod) 发布实现代码。

summary:
oindent	extbf{Background and Objective:} Speech has emerged as a low-cost and non-invasive digital biomarker with considerable potential for cognitive impairment detection. However, limited labeled data and cross-dataset variability remain major challenges for robust speech-based screening systems.   \par
oindent	extbf{Methods:} We developed a segment-level representation learning framework for speech-based cognitive impairment detection. Speech recordings were divided into short segments and converted into spectrogram representations. To improve robustness under limited-data conditions, offline and online augmentation strategies were combined with autoencoder-based representation learning and contrastive objectives to enhance discriminative latent representations.   \par
oindent	extbf{Results:} Experiments conducted on four independent Mandarin Chinese speech datasets demonstrated stable and competitive performance in both binary and three-class classification tasks, with particularly notable improvements in the clinically challenging three-class setting. Ablation studies further supported the effectiveness of the proposed framework.   \par
oindent	extbf{Conclusions:} The findings suggest that segment-level speech representation learning may provide a scalable and practical approach for cognitive impairment screening in resource-constrained clinical settings.
title: Segment-Level Mandarin Chinese Speech-Based Cognitive Impairment Detection via an Autoencoder with Contrastive Learning
title_translated: 基于自编码器与对比学习的分段级普通话语音认知障碍检测
summary_translated: 背景与目标：语音作为一种低成本、非侵入性的数字生物标志物，在认知障碍检测方面展现出巨大潜力。然而，标注数据有限以及跨数据集的差异仍是构建稳健语音筛查系统的主要挑战。方法：我们开发了一种分段级表示学习框架，用于基于语音的认知障碍检测。将语音录音划分为短片段，并转换为频谱图表示。为在数据有限条件下提升鲁棒性，结合离线与在线增强策略，采用基于自编码器的表示学习与对比学习目标，以增强判别性潜在表示。结果：在四个独立的普通话语音数据集上进行的实验表明，该框架在二分类和三分类任务中均表现出稳定且优异的性能，尤其在临床挑战较大的三分类场景中表现突出。消融实验进一步验证了所提框架的有效性。结论：研究结果表明，分段级语音表示学习可能为资源受限的临床环境提供一种可扩展且实用的认知障碍筛查方法。

summary: Mean opinion score (MOS) prediction models are widely used as proxy metrics in text-to-speech (TTS) research, yet their ability to capture quality differences beyond acoustic fidelity remains unclear. We investigate this via controlled perturbations on speech: acoustic degradation, prosodic errors, and manipulation of speaker-specific characteristics such as pitch and speaking rate. We obtained MOS predictions for these speech samples from both human listeners and the model, and analyzed the differences in their perceptual characteristics. Results show that most models track acoustic degradation well, while all are insensitive to prosodic errors despite large subjective score drops. For speaker characteristics, models exhibit a double dissociation: strong mean fundamental frequency (F0) biases absent in human ratings, yet insensitivity to speaking rate and F0 variability that humans notice. These findings highlight limitations of scalar MOS prediction beyond acoustic fidelity.
title: Investigating Human-Model Discrepancies in Speech Quality Assessment via Acoustic and Prosodic Perturbations
title_translated: 通过声学与韵律扰动探究人类与模型在语音质量评估中的差异
summary_translated: 平均意见分（MOS）预测模型广泛用作文本转语音（TTS）研究中的代理指标，但其捕捉超出声学保真度的质量差异的能力尚不明确。我们通过受控扰动语音来研究这一问题：声学退化、韵律错误，以及对音高、语速等说话人特异性特征的操纵。我们从人类听者和模型处获取了这些语音样本的MOS预测，并分析了两者在感知特性上的差异。结果显示，大多数模型能较好跟踪声学退化，但对韵律错误均不敏感，尽管主观评分下降明显。对于说话人特征，模型表现出双重分离现象：对基频（F0）的均值存在强烈偏差，而人类听者并无此倾向；但对语速和F0变异性则不敏感，而人类听者却能察觉。这些发现揭示了标量MOS预测在声学保真度之外的局限性。

summary: The decentralized deployment of LLM agents with diverse capabilities across diverse tasks motivates infrastructure for knowledge sharing across heterogeneous agent populations. Just as search engines index human-generated artifacts to support human problem solving, retrieval systems can organize agent-generated artifacts for reuse across agent populations. We extend retrieval-augmented generation - which demonstrates the value of human-authored artifacts to individual agents - to retrieval of agent-generated artifacts supporting a population of agents. In particular, agent trajectories encode reusable procedural knowledge, yet these artifacts are typically discarded after a single use or retained only by the producing agent, forcing newly instantiated agents to repeatedly rediscover existing solutions. We propose Multi-Agent Transactive Memory (MATM), a framework for population-level storage and retrieval of agent-generated trajectories, where producer agents contribute trajectories to a shared repository and consumer agents retrieve them to improve task execution. We focus on interactive environments (ALFWorld and WebArena), where trajectories are long and encode especially rich procedural structure. Our experiments demonstrate that retrieving trajectories from MATM improves downstream task performance and reduces interaction steps without coordination or joint training. These results position MATM as a design pattern for population-level experience sharing in open agent ecosystems.
title: Multi-Agent Transactive Memory
title_translated: 多智能体情景记忆
summary_translated: 在多样化任务中部署具备多样化能力的大语言模型智能体，促使建立跨异构智能体群体的知识共享基础设施。正如搜索引擎索引人类生成的成果以支持人类解决问题，检索系统也可组织智能体生成的成果，供智能体群体复用。我们拓展了检索增强生成——该技术已证明人类创作成果对单个智能体的价值——至智能体生成成果的检索，以支持智能体群体。具体而言，智能体轨迹编码了可复用的过程性知识，但这些成果通常在单次使用后即被丢弃，或仅由生成者保留，导致新实例化的智能体不得不反复重新发现已有解决方案。我们提出多智能体情景记忆（MATM）框架，实现智能体生成轨迹的群体级存储与检索：生产者智能体将轨迹贡献至共享仓库，消费者智能体从中检索以改进任务执行。我们聚焦于交互式环境（ALFWorld和WebArena），其中轨迹较长且蕴含丰富的过程结构。实验表明，从MATM中检索轨迹可提升下游任务性能并减少交互步骤，且无需协调或联合训练。这些结果使MATM成为开放智能体生态系统中群体级经验共享的设计范式。

summary: Current AI-driven game development has made substantial progress in asset generation, gameplay design, and web-based game coding, yet project-level code engineering on professional game engines remains largely unexplored due to the absence of large-scale datasets and deterministic evaluation methods. We present JamSet and JamBench, the first project-level game code framework dataset and benchmark built on a professional game engine. Our key insight is that Game Jam competitions, community events where developers build complete games under tight time constraints, yield thousands of open-source projects suitable for this purpose. Building on the Godot engine's text-based format and headless execution mode, we design a deterministic verification pipeline from file integrity to runtime behavior collection, distilling 8,133 verified projects from over 240,000 repositories. Of these, 300 manually verified projects form JamBench; the rest constitute JamSet. JamBench defines theme-driven generation and code completion tasks, evaluated through a pipeline combining compilation pass rates, Structural Completeness Score (SCS), and Behavioral Alignment Score (BAS). Evaluation of 9 frontier models reveals a capability cliff as project scale increases, with runtime pass rates dropping from 80.4% on small projects to 5.7% on large ones (Task2a). Code Agents improve compilation rates yet yield no gains in runtime behavioral quality, indicating that the bottleneck lies in architectural design rather than syntactic correctness. Experiments validate JamSet as effective training data. All data and code are publicly available.
title: JAMER: Project-Level Code Framework Dataset and Benchmark on Professional Game Engines
title_translated: JAMER：基于专业游戏引擎的项目级代码框架数据集与基准测试
summary_translated: 当前基于AI的游戏开发在资产生成、玩法设计和基于Web的游戏编码方面取得了显著进展，但专业游戏引擎上的项目级代码工程仍因缺乏大规模数据集和确定性评估方法而未被充分探索。我们提出了JamSet和JamBench，这是首个基于专业游戏引擎构建的项目级游戏代码框架数据集与基准测试。我们的核心洞察是，游戏开发马拉松（Game Jam）这类社区活动，开发者在严格时间限制下构建完整游戏，产生了数千个适合该目的的开源项目。基于Godot引擎的文本格式和无头执行模式，我们设计了一条从文件完整性到运行时行为收集的确定性验证流程，从超过24万仓库中提炼出8,133个已验证项目。其中300个经人工验证的项目构成JamBench；其余构成JamSet。JamBench定义了主题驱动的生成与代码补全任务，通过结合编译通过率、结构完整性评分（SCS）和行为一致性评分（BAS）的评估流水线进行评测。对9个前沿模型的评估显示，随着项目规模增大，性能出现断崖式下降，大型项目运行通过率从小型项目的80.4%降至5.7%（Task2a）。代码代理虽提升了编译通过率，但在运行时行为质量上未见提升，表明瓶颈在于架构设计而非语法正确性。实验验证了JamSet作为训练数据的有效性。所有数据和代码均公开可获取。

summary: Test-time reasoning is increasingly used as a serving-time control knob, but extra reasoning is not uniformly valuable: it can repair failed attempts, waste compute on already-correct answers, or introduce harmful answer changes. We study this as a deployment allocation problem rather than a new-verifier problem. We introduce \sevra, Selective Verification for Reasoning Allocation, a serving-layer controller that decides whether to preserve a frozen solver's initial answer or invoke active verification. Using a frozen Qwen3-4B solver, we log intervention outcomes and train recoverability-aware gates from serving-visible attempt state. On \mathfive, selective verification reaches 76.3\% accuracy, compared with 75.5\% for always verifying, while reducing post-generation tokens by 26.8\% and harmful flips from 2.2\% to 1.0\%. However, an 8,192-token initial solve reaches 76.0\% accuracy with 28\% fewer total model tokens, showing that selective recovery is useful but not the best tested cost frontier. In frozen transfer to \gsm, the selective policy verifies only 3.0\% of examples, improves accuracy from 93.4\% to 94.5\%, and reduces verification tokens by 91.2\% relative to always verifying; again, a longer initial solve matches its accuracy with fewer realized tokens. On CommonsenseQA, always-on verification hurts, while Self-Consistency@5 improves accuracy at about five times the realized token cost. The resulting deployment rule is: tune the initial budget first, then use selective recovery when explicit checks, bounded retries, auditability, or regression-risk control matter.
title: Think Again or Think Longer? Selective Verification for Budget-Aware Reasoning
title_translated: 再思考还是更长时间思考？面向预算感知推理的选择性验证
summary_translated: 测试时推理正日益作为服务阶段的控制手段使用，但额外推理并非总是有价值：它可能修复失败尝试，也可能浪费计算资源于已正确答案，甚至引入有害的答案变更。我们将此问题视为部署资源分配问题，而非新验证器问题。我们提出	exttt{sevra}（Selective Verification for Reasoning Allocation），一种服务于层的控制器，决定是否保留冻结求解器的初始答案，或调用主动验证。使用冻结的Qwen3-4B求解器，我们记录干预结果，并从服务可见的尝试状态中训练具备可恢复性感知的门控机制。在	exttt{math5}上，选择性验证达到76.3%准确率，优于始终验证的75.5%，同时减少26.8%的生成后token数，有害翻转率从2.2%降至1.0%。然而，8,192 token的初始求解达到76.0%准确率，总模型token减少28%，表明选择性恢复虽有用，但并非最优成本边界。在冻结迁移至	exttt{gsm}时，选择性策略仅验证3.0%的样本，准确率从93.4%提升至94.5%，验证token减少91.2%相对于始终验证；同样，更长的初始求解能以更少实际token实现相同准确率。在CommonsenseQA上，始终开启验证反而降低性能，而Self-Consistency@5虽提升准确率，但实际token成本约为五倍。最终部署规则为：先调整初始预算，当需要显式检查、有限重试、可审计性或回归风险控制时，再采用选择性恢复。

summary: We present CombEval, a dynamic benchmark for evaluating combinatorial counting in large language models. CombEval represents each problem as a typed Cofola specification over entities, combinatorial objects, object dependencies, and constraints, enabling controlled generation of natural-language counting problems with exact solver-verified answers. Unlike static collections, CombEval supports systematic variation of object type, entity scale, constraint count, and reasoning depth. We evaluate 11 LLMs under direct and code-augmented settings and find that models remain brittle on ordered objects, indistinguishable elements, relatively positional constraints, and nested object dependencies. Error analysis further identifies failures in constraint interpretation and counting principles. CombEval provides a diagnostic testbed for studying when and why LLMs fail at combinatorial reasoning. The code and generated benchmark suites are publicly available at \url{https://github.com/YuxuZhou-CN/combination-problem-generation}.
title: CombEval: A Framework for Evaluating Combinatorial Counting in Large Language Models

title_translated: CombEval：大语言模型组合计数能力评估框架
summary_translated: 我们提出CombEval，一个用于评估大语言模型组合计数能力的动态基准测试框架。CombEval将每个问题表示为关于实体、组合对象、对象依赖关系和约束的类型化Cofola规范，支持可控生成具有精确求解器验证答案的自然语言计数问题。与静态数据集不同，CombEval支持系统性地变化对象类型、实体规模、约束数量和推理深度。我们在直接提示与代码增强设置下评估了11个LLM，发现模型在有序对象、不可区分元素、相对位置约束及嵌套对象依赖方面依然脆弱。错误分析进一步揭示了约束理解偏差和计数原理应用失败的问题。CombEval为研究LLM在组合推理中何时以及为何失败提供了诊断性测试平台。代码与生成的基准套件已在https://github.com/YuxuZhou-CN/combination-problem-generation公开。

summary: Financial chart question answering in regulated settings demands more than accuracy: practitioners must know which answers to trust before acting on them, and many institutions cannot send client data to external model providers. Yet existing chart-QA agents are accuracy-focused and opaque, and most assume proprietary API access; to our knowledge, none combines auditability with on-premise deployability without significant accuracy compromise. We present AgentFinVQA, a multi-agent pipeline that decomposes each query into planning, OCR, legend grounding, visual inspection, and verification, recording every step in a traceable Model Evaluation Packet (MEP) per sample. On FinMME, AgentFinVQA improves $+7.68$ pp over a primary-backbone matched zero-shot baseline with a proprietary backbone (Gemini-3 Flash; 71.24% vs. 63.56%, McNemar $p \approx 1.1 \times 10^{-16}$), and $+4.84$ pp with open-weights Qwen3.6-27B-FP8 served locally. The verifier's verdict also serves as a useful confidence signal (68.2% vs. 55.6% exact accuracy on confirmed vs. revised answers), enabling human-in-the-loop review routing. Error analysis shows that question misunderstanding, legend confusion and extraction error account for nearly two-thirds of failures and are the categories least detected by the verifier, identifying clear directions for future work. Together these results show that auditable, on-premise financial chart QA is practical and that the open-weights system keeps most of the accuracy gains while enabling full data residency. We release our code to support reproducible evaluation.
title: AgentFinVQA: A Deployable Multi-Agent Pipeline for Auditable Financial Chart QA
title_translated: AgentFinVQA：可部署的多智能体金融图表问答管道
summary_translated: 在受监管环境中，金融图表问答不仅要求高精度，还要求从业者能够判断哪些答案值得信赖后再采取行动，且许多机构无法将客户数据发送给外部模型提供商。然而，现有图表问答智能体多聚焦于准确性且不透明，多数假设拥有专有API访问权限；据我们所知，尚无系统能在不显著牺牲准确率的前提下，同时实现可审计性与本地部署。我们提出AgentFinVQA，一个多智能体管道，将每个查询分解为规划、OCR、图例定位、视觉检查和验证步骤，并为每个样本记录可追溯的模型评估包（MEP）。在FinMME上，AgentFinVQA相较于主干匹配的零样本基线（使用专有骨干Gemini-3 Flash；71.24% vs. 63.56%，McNemar p ≈ 1.1 × 10⁻¹⁶），提升+7.68个百分点；使用本地部署的开源权重Qwen3.6-27B-FP8时，提升+4.84个百分点。验证器的判断结果也提供了有用的置信度信号（确认答案准确率为68.2%，修订答案为55.6%），支持人机协同审查路由。错误分析表明，问题误解、图例混淆和提取错误占失败近三分之二，且是验证器最难以检测的类别，指明了未来工作的明确方向。这些结果共同表明，可审计、本地部署的金融图表问答是可行的，且开源权重系统在保持大部分准确率增益的同时，实现了完整的数据驻留。我们发布代码以支持可复现评估。

summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a central approach for improving reasoning capabilities in large language models (LLMs), where training efficiency depends critically on how problems are sampled during optimization. Existing adaptive curriculum learning methods typically prioritize prompts of intermediate difficulty, treating problem selection as a standard bandit problem with independent arms and overlooking the structured, heterogeneous nature of the task space. In this work, we frame problem sampling as a manifold-structured bandit problem with endogenous non-stationarity: problems are related through the model's latent representation space, and sampling decisions can steer how learning signals evolve across that space. To operationalize this perspective, we introduce Bayesian Manifold Curriculum (BMC), a structure-aware framework that organizes problems into a hierarchical task tree and applies Bayesian learning to guide sampling. Empirically, we find that different sampling strategies induce non-trivial tradeoffs between productivity (learning signal), diversity (coverage of the task manifold), and utility (evaluation relevance). These results show that prioritizing difficulty alone is insufficient for strong downstream performance, highlighting the importance of incorporating structure and type-awareness into problem sampling.
title: Manifold Bandits: Bayesian Curriculum Learning over the Latent Geometry of Large Language Models
title_translated: 流形老虎机：大语言模型潜在几何空间上的贝叶斯课程学习
summary_translated: 强化学习（RL）是提升大语言模型（LLMs）推理能力的核心方法，其训练效率关键取决于优化过程中问题的采样方式。现有自适应课程学习方法通常优先选择中等难度提示，将问题选择视为标准老虎机问题，忽略了任务空间的结构化与异质性特征。本文将问题采样建模为具有内生非平稳性的流形结构老虎机问题：问题通过模型的潜在表示空间相互关联，采样决策可引导学习信号在该空间中的演化。为实现这一视角，我们提出贝叶斯流形课程（BMC）框架，将问题组织成层次化任务树，并应用贝叶斯学习指导采样。实证研究表明，不同的采样策略在生产力（学习信号）、多样性（任务流形覆盖）和实用性（评估相关性）之间产生显著权衡。这些结果表明，仅优先考虑难度不足以获得优异下游表现，强调在问题采样中融入结构信息与类型感知的重要性。

summary: A new class of agentic review systems are emerging as a remedy to the pressure placed on peer review systems by AI-assisted research, but it is unclear how they should be evaluated. We evaluate two open-source systems (OpenAIReview and coarse), one proprietary system (Reviewer3), and a zero-shot baseline, across six LLMs spanning frontier and efficient models. First, we study whether AI reviews on ICLR/NeurIPS papers track with papers' quality as approximated by external signals such as citations and acceptance decisions. Every system performs above chance in pairwise accuracy, and the best is OpenAIReview + GPT-5.5 at 83.0%. Second, to test whether systems can catch errors with known ground truth, we construct a perturbation benchmark that injects four categories of errors into papers across eight arXiv subject classes and measure detection recall. The strongest configuration (OpenAIReview + GPT-5.5) catches 71.6% of injected errors, leaving substantial room for improvement. The union of detections across six models reaches 83.3% recall, suggesting different models detect different errors and better harness design can potentially increase performance. Beyond these benchmarks, we study a public deployment of OpenAIReview with real users. Votes on its comments skew positive at 1.44 to 1, and the most common complaints are about false positives and minor nitpicks. Together, by evaluating full review systems backed by state-of-the-art models on real research papers, we show that while AI reviews still have room for improvement, they can already track human quality judgments well, catch important errors, and earn positive feedback from real users.
title: Benchmarking Agentic Review Systems
title_translated: 智能体评审系统的基准测试
summary_translated: 一类新兴的智能体评审系统被提出，以应对AI辅助研究对同行评审系统带来的压力，但其评估方式尚不明确。我们在六种涵盖前沿与高效模型的大语言模型上，评估了两个开源系统（OpenAIReview和coarse）、一个专有系统（Reviewer3）以及一个零样本基线。首先，我们研究了AI对ICLR/NeurIPS论文的评审是否能与论文质量（通过引用次数和录用决定等外部信号近似）保持一致。所有系统在成对准确率上均高于随机水平，最佳表现是OpenAIReview + GPT-5.5，达到83.0%。其次，为测试系统能否发现具有已知真实错误的漏洞，我们构建了一个扰动基准，将四类错误注入八个arXiv主题类别中的论文，并测量错误检测召回率。最强配置（OpenAIReview + GPT-5.5）仅捕获了71.6%的注入错误，仍有较大提升空间。六个模型检测结果的并集达到83.3%的召回率，表明不同模型检测不同错误，更好的设计可能进一步提升性能。此外，我们还研究了OpenAIReview在真实用户中的公开部署情况：评论投票倾向正面（1.44:1），主要投诉集中在误报和琐碎问题。综上，通过对基于最先进模型的真实研究论文进行完整评审系统的评估，我们表明尽管AI评审仍有改进空间，但已能较好追踪人类质量判断、发现重要错误，并获得真实用户的积极反馈。

summary: Semantic caching cuts LLM inference costs by serving a cached response to semantically similar queries. Standard practice evaluates these systems using PR-AUC, a metric that only measures how well scores rank and ignores whether they are usable at a fixed threshold. We show this mismatch leads to systematically poor deployment choices, as models with the highest PR-AUC are often the worst in operation. We introduce Precision-Cache Hit Ratio (P-CHR) AUC, a cache-aware metric that measures precision across cache utilization levels, and Calibration Retention Rate (CRR), which captures how much offline ranking quality survives at deployment. We decompose the operational gap between offline and deployed quality into a recoverable calibration component and an irreducible structural component fixed by the dataset's positive rate. Our experiments show that the calibration gap is governed by the training objective rather than data scale, and post-hoc calibration only partially closes it. Ultimately, model selection for semantic caching is a calibration problem, not a ranking one, and measuring it is the first step to closing the gap.
title: Closing the Calibration Gap in Semantic Caching
